"Home and Garden" style shortform reel series. I'll be honest and say that the raw footage is not great. Need someone who can sort through, pick best takes, and edit two shortform IG reel formats. opportunities.title: Cruise & Resort Reservation Specialist
opportunities.description:
Position Overview

We are currently seeking a professional and detail-oriented Cruise & Resort Reservation Specialist to assist with coordinating vacation bookings and client travel arrangements in a remote environment.

This role focuses on helping clients secure cruise vacations, all-inclusive resorts, accommodations, and related travel experiences while providing excellent customer support throughout the booking process.

This opportunity is ideal for individuals who enjoy organization, communication, and helping clients plan memorable vacations.
